hero.label: Made for Rethoric
hero.headline: I want to help Rethoric turn outbound into founder pipeline.
hero.subheadline: Rethoric sits at the intersection of founder-led growth, LinkedIn distribution, and outbound execution, which makes this role especially compelling to me. I am excited by the chance to help Eduardo and the team book qualified meetings with startup founders who already understand the value of audience, trust, and consistent content.

whyCompany.title: Rethoric solves a real founder distribution problem
whyCompany.body: Most founders know they should build on LinkedIn, but very few can do it consistently at a high level. Rethoric's plug-and-play model and focus on helping clients reach 1M+ monthly impressions makes the value proposition concrete, measurable, and easy to believe in.

whyCompany.title: Founding BDR is a rare chance to shape pipeline
whyCompany.body: Joining a four-person YC-backed team at this stage means outbound is not just a function, it is a lever for company growth. I am excited by the opportunity to help define messaging, test channels, and build repeatable pipeline with direct visibility into results.

whyCompany.title: My background fits outbound with founder empathy
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I worked as a BDR using cold outreach, HubSpot, and LinkedIn sequences to help acquire 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I deepened my digital marketing understanding in a B2B consulting environment, which helps me speak more credibly to how content and messaging drive trust and conversion.

quote: I want this role because Rethoric is selling something founders already want, but often struggle to execute consistently. I would love to be the person who opens those conversations and turns interest into real pipeline.
